title: An Enigma at the Fair

scenes.text: A young boy goes missing from a bustling fairground, never to be seen again.
It happened in Chicago, at the Century of Progress World's Fair.
In 1933, 9-year-old Charles Lindbergh Jr. disappeared from the fair, shocking the nation.
The fair ended, but the mystery of Charles remains unanswered.
Charles’ case remains one of the most infamous unsolved mysteries.
scenes.label: UNSOLD CASE

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Chicago, USA - 1933. A young boy named Charles Lindbergh Jr. vanishes amidst the excitement of the Century of Progress World's Fair, leaving questions behind. Follow for daily cold cases!
